insight: Boss equipment is one fixed item per slot; the % chance shown in the Equipment menu is the death drop chance, not a spawn chance, so random gear variants need a duplicated Boss (/boss duplicate) with its own spawn rule Chance. One spawn rule spawns EVERY Boss on its list, so each variant must live in a separate rule.

Random_Equipment_On_Empty_Slots (default false, toggle in the Equipment menu) controls empty slots only: when off, Boss clears empty equipment slots and strips vanilla's naturally rolled gear; when on, vanilla's random gear is kept. Explains both "my boss spawned with armor I never set" and "how do I get vanilla armor variety" questions.
